title: Recover missing service bootstrap instructions
user_request: Add search-by-tag support to the notes API while preserving the existing create and list endpoints.

harness_gap.description: Integration tests require a local database service, but the harness exposes only package installation and unit-test commands.

trajectory_signals: integration test pass after service startup
decision_signals: supervisor attribution to missing service bootstrap
decision contract for adding startup protocol

intervention_trace.summary: The user noticed repeated connection failures and manually started the database service before tests could run.
evidence: manual command: docker compose up -d db

decision_contract.hypothesis: The worker cannot validate the feature because the harness omits the database service required by integration tests.
decision_contract.expected_effect: Adding a service bootstrap artifact should make integration validation available during replay without manual startup.
decision_contract.falsification_check: Replay still shows connection refusal or needs a manual docker command.

permissions: supervisor may edit service bootstrap files
worker may run local containerized services
worker must not access external production databases
information_boundaries: service startup logs are visible to supervisor and worker

replay_protocol.replay: run worker from the original user_request after the supervisor adds service bootstrap to the harness
success_criteria: no manual service startup is required

notes: Seed card for benchmark design; executable fixture still needs to be built.
